title: toxicodendron lentii
intro: Toxicodendron lentii, also known as poison oak, is a plant species belonging to the Anacardiaceae family, characterized by its glossy leaves and reddish or greenish stems. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Toxicodendron lentii include its ability to treat skin conditions such as eczema and dermatitis, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, salves, and tinctures, which are often used topically to treat skin issues and internally to support overall health.
